title: 10 best herbal teas for tonsillitis
intro_desc: Herbal teas for tonsillitis are natural remedies that help alleviate the symptoms of tonsillitis, such as sore throats, fever, and swollen lymph nodes, by promoting healing and reducing inflammation. The best herbal teas for tonsillitis include Echinacea purpurea, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Sambucus nigra, Echinacea angustifolia, Thymus vulgaris, Zingiber officinale, Achillea millefolium, Eucalyptus globulus, Hydrastis canadensis, and Melissa officinalis. If left untreated, tonsillitis can lead to missed work or school, reduced productivity, and strained relationships due to chronic pain and discomfort.
